assertions.assertion: Explains that IProfileService.GetProfileDataAsync receives ProfileDataRequestContext with RequestedClaimTypes
assertions.rationale: The RequestedClaimTypes property and its role in filtering are Duende-specific internals not commonly known

assertions.assertion: Explains that AddRequestedClaims filters to only emit claims whose type is in RequestedClaimTypes
assertions.rationale: AddRequestedClaims behavior is Duende-specific API knowledge

assertions.assertion: Shows how to declare UserClaims on an ApiScope or ApiResource to include them in the requested types
assertions.rationale: UserClaims on ApiScope/ApiResource is somewhat known from Duende documentation and community content

assertions.assertion: Does NOT require sub-documents — this is answered entirely from the core SKILL.md
assertions.rationale: This is a meta-assertion about document structure, not about response content. Regardless of quality, an LLM wouldn't reference sub-documents it doesn't have
